lines.en_lit: about the ritual impurity of home,

Rabbi Yoḥanan said to Reish Lakish: Granted, to my that I derive from inauguration, that which is taught this and that one sprinkles upon him all seven from all sin-offerings that were there that there was also sprinkling during inauguration. However, according to your that you derive it from Sinai, was there sprinkling at Sinai?

said to him: And according to your reasoning, does it well? inauguration, blood; here, water. That is not difficult, as Rabbi Ḥiyya taught: Water replaced blood, However, according to your at Sinai, was there sprinkling said to him: merely a higher standard,

was taught in accordance with Rabbi Yoḥanan and was taught in accordance with Reish Lakish was taught in accordance with Rabbi Yoḥanan: “With this Aaron will come into the Sanctuary, that which is stated in the matter. What is the matter of the inauguration. And what is stated in the matter of inauguration? Aaron withdrew seven and served one day, and Moses transmitted to him all seven in order to train him in the service.

And generations as well, High Priest withdraws seven and serves one day. And two Torah scholars from the students of Moses, to the exclusion of Sadducees, transmit to him all seven in order to train him in the service.

From there said Seven days prior to Yom Kippur remove the High Priest, from his house to the Chamber of Parhedrin; and just as remove the High Priest, so do they remove the priest who burns the heifer, to the chamber that was before the bira northeast And both this and that one sprinkles upon him, all seven from all the sin-offerings that were there

And if you say inauguration blood, here water, you said: Water replaced blood. And it says “As has been done this day, so the Lord has commanded to do, to make atonement for you” To do, these are the actions of the heifer; to make atonement, these are the actions Yom Kippur.

But With this [bezot], is required for itself; a young bull for a sin-offering and a ram for a burnt-offering. say If only to the offerings, let the verse say: With this [bezeh], or: With these [be’elleh], What, bezot, Learn from it two

What And it says? And if you say it is the first Yom Kippur that requires sequestering, as we find in inauguration but on Yom Kippur in general, no, alternatively, It is the first High Priest who requires sequestering, but High Priests in general, no, come hear “As has been done

was taught in accordance with Reish Lakish Moses ascended in the cloud, and was covered in the cloud, and was sanctified in the cloud, in order to receive the Torah for the Jewish people in sanctity, as it is stated: “And the glory of the Lord abode upon Mount Sinai This was an incident after the the Ten Commandments were the beginning forty days the statement of Rabbi Yosei HaGelili.
Rabbi Akiva says: “And the glory of the Lord abode New Moon
